name: NCIS: Origins
overview: In 1991, years prior to the events of NCIS, Leroy Jethro Gibbs starts his career as a newly minted special agent at the fledgling NCIS Camp Pendleton office, where he forges his place on a gritty, ragtag team led by NCIS legend Mike Franks.

trailers.title: NCIS: Origins (CBS) Teaser HD - Gibbs prequel series
